leadText: Mystical Fire (Japanese: マジカルフレイム Magical Flame) is a damage-dealing Fire-type move introduced in Generation VI. It was TM92 in Pokémon Sword and Shield.

sections.title: Effect
sections.text: Contents 1 Effect 1.1 Generation VI 1.2 Generation VII onwards 1.3 Generation VIII 1.3.1 Pokémon Legends: Arceus 1.4 Generation IX 1.4.1 Pokémon Legends: Z-A Effect [ edit | edit source ] Generation VI [ edit | edit source ] Mystical Fire inflicts damage and lowers the target's Special Attack stat by one stage. Generation VII onwards [ edit | edit source ] Mystical Fire had its power increased from 65 to 75. Generation VIII [ edit | edit source ] Pokémon Legends: Arceus [ edit | edit source ] Mystical Fire's power was decreased to 70, and it lowers the opponent's offensive stats. sections.title: Description
sections.text: Description [ edit | edit source ] Games Description X Y OR AS S M US UM P E Sw Sh BD SP S V The user attacks by breathing a special, hot fire. This also lowers the target's Sp. Atk stat. LA The user attacks by breathing a special, hot fire. This also lowers the target's offensive stats. ZA The user attacks by breathing a special kind of searing flame. This also lowers targets' Sp. Atk stats for a short time.

sections.title: Description
sections.text: Description [ edit | edit source ] Games Description S MD MD RT DX It damages an enemy. It also lowers the enemy's Sp. Atk.

sections.title: Trivia
sections.text: Trivia [ edit | edit source ] Mystical Fire is the only Fire-type move that was introduced in Generation VI .
